channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Every growing rubbish dumping, 19th March
item.description:
First it was a fridge freezer, then sofas cushions lots of dog poo and lots of other stuff is being dumped . There are 2 parking bays here of which one is impossible to use as the fridge freezer has been pushed over and is balancing precariously. This rubbish has been here and growing for 2 months
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, Sweeps Lane, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bandstand crown missing, 19th March
item.description:
Bandstand ( Bowie bandstand) crowns on top are all missing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant litter & rat issues at this location!, 19th March
item.description:
Current litter issues along Southwark park Road - outside the food shops ! rubbish on pavement which is then ripped open by rats / birds

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southwark Park Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 19th March
item.description:
Rubbish is being left outside properties or non-rubbish collection days, they are being ripped open at night by animals. This is constantly bringing the whole area down this is just one of many pictures.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34-44, Chatham Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lights on red the whole time, 19th March
item.description:
Lights on RED the whole time, everyone has been using the car horns since 7am every single minute.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 125, East End Road, Finchley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox in dock, 19th March
item.description:
There is a dead fox in the dock

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greenland Quay, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa and litter dumped, 19th March
item.description:
This sofa has been dumped at the intersection of Brooke and Reighton

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Reighton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 large coaches parked on residental street, 19th March
item.description:
There are two coaches that have been parked on the street taking up a lot of the parking spaces for two days now

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rotherhithe Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Everyday people are just leaving their rubbish outside which is being ripped apart by foxes and causing a huge mess and bringing the area down, 19th March
item.description:
The problem is that local residents don’t care and have nothing to fear when dumping their rubbish on the street. If they were issued fines I’m sure this would make them think

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34-44, Chatham Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flower bed, 19th March
item.description:
Foxes ruined at night

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tennyson Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Upright fridge just past 91/92 Park Mead Sidcup on f/way, 19th March
item.description:
Upright fridge just past 91/92 Park Mead Sidcup on f/way
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Mead, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 4 large potholes have expanded and almost making one large one 2-3m, 19th March
item.description:
The potholes have been there for 2 years but worsened after B15 diverted here and also during the winter. Cars skid and lose control. The affected area is in line with the path of bikes and crossing pedestrians and likely to cause personal injury if not seen in advance by road users. 3 primary schools in less than 0.2miles,so junction is used by many pedestrians ,prams and bikes on the way to and from school . Junction of Farnham Rd and Gipsy .
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farnham Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Holes in road, 19th March
item.description:
Large potholes in road causing problems for cars

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Prince Rupert Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Speed limit signs, 19th March
item.description:
Ravensdale Rd has no speed limit signs painted on the road or on posts and people regularly exceed the speed limit despite the speed bumps. Please could you paint the 20mph limit on the road? Speed cameras? There are schools and synagogues on this road.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ravensdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
